description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring a three-tiered design. The frame is constructed from thick, rust-colored metal beams with visible bolts at the corners, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Each shelf is made of a solid, weathered wood plank, providing ample space for storage or display. The sides of the unit are reinforced with diagonal metal cross-bracing, enhancing both stability and visual interest. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings. The overall aesthetic is functional and sturdy, with a blend of raw metal and aged wood textures.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial shelving unit with a rusted metal frame, cross-braced sides, and three weathered wooden shelves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelving and the solid metal frame with visible bolts, no cross-bracing on this side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the diagonal metal cross-bracing and the depth of the wooden shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with open shelving and no cross-bracing visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with prominent diagonal metal cross-bracing and visible shelf structure.
